sourceRegistry.rule: Freshness records review state and timing only. It is not a legal-validity conclusion.

triggers.label: Purpose or affected population materially changes
Autonomy, tools, permissions, or action space expands
New data class, provenance issue, or sensitivity increase
Actual or credible harm, rights impact, or unsafe outcome
Control bypass, failed checkpoint, or monitoring blind spot
Material source or internal requirement is superseded

disclaimer: These operational triggers support review planning. They do not determine legal obligations, compliance, certification, or incident materiality.
